perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Three people are standing on a wooden deck outdoors with trees in the background. The central figure is a man in a striped shirt (Tsai A-ga) who is enthusiastically holding a transparent donation box. To his left is a person wearing a large traditional mask and a red hoodie, and to his right is a woman in a white sweater. (2) The man holds up a pink and blue flyer and the donation box close to the camera, showing details of the 'Hao Li Ga' Social Welfare Association. (3) The man gestures emphatically while talking, pointing to the donation box and the screen. The person in the mask claps periodically. (4) Close-up shots of the text on the donation box and flyer are shown. (5) The group gathers closer to the camera at the end, waving and smiling while the man points downward to imply a link or form.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, fast-paced male vocals start immediately, speaking in an excited and welcoming tone. An upbeat, rhythmic electronic BGM plays in the background. (2) Sound effects of a crowd cheering and clapping are layered over the main speech as the man announces the opening of small donations. (3) The male speaker continues with a high speech density, explaining the '5353' donation code. A female voice occasionally provides short, affirmative responses like 'Yes' or 'Correct'. (4) The music remains consistent in its upbeat tempo. (5) In the final phase, all three individuals are heard shouting a synchronized slogan together before the audio fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '好里家社福協會' (Hao Li Ga Social Welfare Association) appears as a main title. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '\開放小額捐款/' (Small donations now open) appears with emphasis marks. (3) Functional Text: '勸募字號' (Fundraising permit number) and detailed registration info. (4) Hook Text: '5353' appearing in large font for the donation code. (5) Functional Text: '正式募集全台灣全國店家!' (Officially recruiting stores across Taiwan!). (6) Hook Text: '歡迎底下填表' (Welcome to fill out the form below) with a pointing finger emoji.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Announcement of small donations -> Explanation of donation code -> Call for business partners -> Outro.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 female co-host, 1 person in a mask and red hoodie.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main male character has brown hair, wears a grey and white horizontal striped long-sleeve shirt and jeans, exhibiting very high energy.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A wooden boardwalk or deck area surrounded by lush green trees and some modern apartment buildings visible in the distance.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Information Disclosure -> Call to Action -> Collective Outro.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional announcement for the 'Hao Li Ga' Social Welfare Association. It aims to inform the public that small-amount donations are now officially open and to recruit local businesses across Taiwan to place donation boxes in their stores to support the charity's mission.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The main creator is directly promoting his own social welfare organization and asking for public support and business partnerships.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Tsai A-ga's signature high-speed, high-decibel hosting style and the appearance of his team members.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of variety-show style captions and sound effects is typical for high-engagement social media content in Taiwan.
